summary: Ocean2Joy v2.0 - Design migration testing (dark to light ocean theme). All backend APIs (22/22) pass. All frontend flows work correctly with new light theme. Design changes successfully applied.
critical_code_review_comments: Light theme migration completed successfully - all dark colors replaced with sky-500/teal-500/white scheme
All data-testid attributes preserved from previous iteration
Beach split-screen design on Login/Register pages looks professional
Service cards and pricing section properly styled with light theme
Document preview modal works with light theme styling

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all flows working with new light theme)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing test data from iteration_1
context_for_next_testing_agent: Design migration from dark to light theme completed and verified. All features tested: Homepage (ocean gradient hero, yellow CTA, services section, footer), Auth (login/register with beach split-screen), Dashboard (white cards, colored status badges), New Project (white form card), Project Details (sky-blue timeline, chat with sky-500 send button), Document Preview (white modal). Backend unchanged and all 22 API tests pass.

homepage.hero_section: PASS - Ocean gradient (sky-500/teal-500) with 'Dive Into an Ocean' text and yellow CTA button
homepage.our_work_section: PASS - Demo video placeholders with light gray cards
homepage.services_section: PASS - 3 service tiers (Basic, Standard, Premium) with 'POPULAR' badge on Premium
homepage.footer: PASS - Legal info (Vera Iambaeva, Tax ID 302335809, Georgia) with light theme

auth.login_page: PASS - Beach split-screen design with sky-teal gradient button
auth.register_page: PASS - Beach split-screen with 'Start Your Journey' text
auth.login_flow: PASS - Authenticates and redirects to dashboard

dashboard.layout: PASS - Gray-50 background with white project cards
dashboard.project_cards: PASS - White cards with colored status badges (submitted=blue, order_activated=yellow)
dashboard.navigation: PASS - White navbar with Ocean2Joy logo and sky-teal buttons

new_project.form: PASS - White form card on gray-50 background
new_project.submit: PASS - Sky-teal gradient 'Submit Project Request' button works

project_details.layout: PASS - White cards with project info
project_details.operational_chain: PASS - 12-stage timeline with sky-500 completed border/icons
project_details.chat: PASS - White background, sky-500 send button, messages display correctly
project_details.document_preview: PASS - White modal with document content

theme_verification.contrast_check: PASS - Text has good contrast on light backgrounds
theme_verification.consistency: PASS - Light theme applied consistently across all pages
